name: Hershey's Kiss Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, shortening, and margarine until well combined.
3. Add the egg yolk and vanilla to the mixture. Stir until incorporated.
4. Gradually add the flour and salt, mixing until the dough holds together.
5. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
6. Lightly beat the egg whites in a small bowl.
7. Dip each ball of dough into the beaten egg white, then roll in chopped nuts.
8. Place the cookies about 1 inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Press your thumb into the center of each cookie.
10. Bake for 8 to 9 minutes, or until lightly browned.
11. Remove from the oven immediately and let cool on the baking sheet.
12. Place a Hershey's Kiss in the center of each cooled cookie. The kiss will melt slightly due to the warmth of the cookie.
13. Allow the kisses to harden before storing. These cookies make about 3 dozen.
